class.name: ResonanceAudioEffect
class.brief_description: Audio bus effect for reverb output. Auto-configured by ResonanceRuntime.
class.description: ResonanceAudioEffect is an [AudioEffect] that processes the reverb bus. It is added to [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.reverb_bus_name] when the plugin or [url=#ResonanceRuntime]ResonanceRuntime[/url] initializes. For Convolution reflection type, it reads from the Steam Audio reflection mixer. For Parametric/Hybrid, reverb is applied per-source in [ResonancePlayer]; when dry and wet buses differ, wet is routed to a separate child player on the effective reverb bus. Adjust [member gain_db] for reverb bus volume. After this bus, Godot routes output to the same target as [method ResonanceRuntimeConfig.get_bus_effective] (runtime [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.bus]).

members.member: Volume correction in dB for the reverb bus. 0 = unity.
